---
title: "Chapter 2: Advanced Topics"
---

## Interactive Content

One of the strengths of publishing with Quarto is the ability to embed interactive
elements directly in your content.

## Data Visualization

You can include charts, tables, and interactive widgets. Here's an example using
a Claude artifact:

::: {.claude-artifact}
<div style="padding: 1.5rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1e293b, #283548); border-radius: 12px; font-family: system-ui; text-align: center;">
  <h4 style="color: #38bdf8; margin: 0 0 1rem 0;">Sample Bar Chart</h4>
  <div style="display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: center; gap: 0.75rem; height: 150px;">
    <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem;">
      <div style="width: 40px; height: 60px; background: #38bdf8; border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0;"></div>
      <span style="color: #94a3b8; font-size: 0.75rem;">Q1</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem;">
      <div style="width: 40px; height: 100px; background: #38bdf8; border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0;"></div>
      <span style="color: #94a3b8; font-size: 0.75rem;">Q2</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem;">
      <div style="width: 40px; height: 80px; background: #38bdf8; border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0;"></div>
      <span style="color: #94a3b8; font-size: 0.75rem;">Q3</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem;">
      <div style="width: 40px; height: 130px; background: #34d399; border-radius: 4px 4px 0 0;"></div>
      <span style="color: #94a3b8; font-size: 0.75rem;">Q4</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
:::

## Next Steps

Continue adding chapters by creating new `.qmd` files in the book folder and
registering them in `_quarto.yml`.
